skill._comment: repo is the monorepo root (this repo); path is the skill's subdir within it. base_ref is the branch holding the migrated skills — switch to main once skang/workflow-specific-skills is merged.
skill.name: exa-candidate-sourcing

models._comment: Outer stays on a strong Anthropic model via the regular account. The other four run open-weights models over OpenRouter (see actor_providers). Change these ids to any from openrouter.ai/models; inner/validator carry the agentic + fact-check load, so they get the stronger model.

providers._comment: Routing presets. base_url must speak the Anthropic Messages API (Claude Code only talks that protocol). Secrets stay in the environment: ${VAR} is expanded at runtime from that env var, never stored here. 'anthropic' has no base_url, so actors on it use this machine's regular Claude account.

openrouter._comment: OpenRouter's 'Anthropic Skin' — base_url is /api (NOT /api/v1, which is the OpenAI path). Claude Code speaks its native protocol directly; no proxy. Key starts with sk-or-. Model ids are OpenRouter ids from openrouter.ai/models, set per-actor in models.* .

actor_providers._comment: Which provider each actor runs on. Default is 'anthropic'. Keep the strategic Outer (edit proposer) on a strong Anthropic model via your regular account; route the cheap, high-volume actors (user/inner/validator/importer) at open-weights providers to cut cost. When you move an actor to a preset, set models.<actor> to a model that preset serves.

scoring._comment: Run score is 0-100. Any hard violation fails the gate regardless of score. Weights must sum to 1.0.

budget._comment: Large/thorough profile: full suite live-record once, iterate in replay, live-confirm winners.

paths._comment: {skill} resolves to skill.name — every skill gets its own suite, inbox, fixtures, labels, and experiment log. runs/, workspace/, prompts/ are shared.
